First I traveled to Miami, then I attended the conference.

Hi Percival, how was your trip to Brasilia? Did your flight arrive on time?
Yes, it was great. First, the flight departed at six and arrived on time.
Nice. And then? Did you meet the client?
Yes. A colleague met me, and then we had a long meeting. The schedule was busy.
That sounds intense. What was the highlight of the trip?
The water plant visit. After that, I returned to the hotel. Finally, I wrote a short summary.
It arrived on time at eight.
Then, a colleague met me at the airport.
After that, we met the client.

Hi, this is Percival. I want to tell you the story of my last business trip. Two weeks ago I traveled to Brasilia for a meeting with an important client. First, I left my house very early, at four in the morning. My flight departed at six, and it arrived on time at eight. Then a colleague picked me up at the airport, and we drove to the office together. After that, we had a long meeting with the client. The schedule was very busy, but everything went well. Later, we visited the new water plant, and that was the highlight of the trip. Finally, in the evening I returned to the hotel, and I wrote a short summary of the day. It was a hard trip, but a very good one.

Hi Percival, this is Karen. I want to give you a quick update about my trip to Recife. Yesterday I departed from Sao Paulo at seven in the morning. The flight was a little late, so I did not arrive on time. When I arrived, a colleague met me at the airport, and we went straight to the client. The meeting was the highlight of my day, because the client approved our plan. After the meeting, I checked the schedule for next week, and I sent you the new dates. Everything went well in the end. Talk to you soon, and have a great trip.

First, Percival left his house very early in the morning. Then his flight departed at six and arrived on time. After that, a colleague picked him up at the airport. Later, they had a long meeting with the client. Finally, Percival returned to the hotel and wrote a short summary.
